name: sqlreduce
title: sqlreduce
summary: Reduce verbose SQL queries to minimal examples
description:
Reduce verbose SQL queries to minimal examples
SQLreduce takes as input an arbitrary SQL query which is then run against a
PostgreSQL server. Various simplification steps are applied, while checking
that the simplified query still exhibits the same error from PostgreSQL.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use sqlreduce because Reduce verbose SQL queries to minimal examples.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use sqlreduce as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair sqlreduce with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `sqlreduce --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
